channel.title: Mental-Models on >_ John Januszczak | Technology & Innovation
channel.description: Recent content in Mental-Models on >_ John Januszczak | Technology & Innovation

item.title: The Terminal is Your Chalk Circle: Why I Code from the Observation Deck
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: Why leading in the era of Generative AI requires a shift from ‘getting your hands dirty’ in code to observing systems like a Toyota foreman in a chalk circle.

item.title: Top 15 Books in the Andreessen Horowitz Library
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: Curated list of 15 influential books from the Andreessen Horowitz library covering startups, product, strategy, design, and leadership.
